Is there a story I should do before proceeding to chapter 7? Ryker appearance was a jumpscare to me

In general ||the MC gets trapped in a timeloop on a ship led by "the Divine Mother" (Genesis Murphy). They finally find William there and work together with him to prevent the ship from sinking following a classic Goliath usurping and ideally save Murphy. It eventually turns out that they're all in a magical domain that Genesis Tulu gave to Murphy and she has to sort through her issues with her Mom and find the courage to live as herself again even if it means letting go of the power and comfort of her new role. There's a big fight against the embodiment of her original wish for isolation and at the climax, William saves the MC and they promise to go back together. At the end, we find out that this world is also a dream, and that Tulu never died in it (which is why he looks like an adult). Also, there's a mysterious weaver lady who he seems to know but we don't know much about her yet|| That's the basics, I'd say
You should definitely play Ramona: Timeworn's sidestory or a certain moment is going to be really confusing

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...
